name: Ramen
description: A veggie broth ramen with tamago eggs or crisp fried tofu. Classic Japanese noodle soup made vegetarian — both versions work.

ingredients.name: kombu
ingredients.notes: 1 × 10g piece, soaked for half an hour in cold water; or 2 tsp seaweed flakes

ingredients.name: Chinese lettuce or cabbage, cut into slim wedges
onion, coarsely sliced from top to bottom
large carrot, cut into 1/2cm slices on the diagonal
spring onions
ingredients.notes: whites cut on the diagonal, greens very finely sliced

steps.title: Make the broth
steps.content: Put {0001}, {0002}, {0003}, {0004}, {0005}, {0006}, {0007} and {0008} into a saucepan and add 1.5 litres of water. Bring to the boil, then turn the heat down and simmer for 30 minutes until everything is very soft and the stock has reduced by about a third. Remove from the heat and leave to stand.

steps.title: Brown the vegetables
steps.content: In a separate pan, heat {0009}. Add {0010} and fry over high heat until lightly browned on the cut sides, then remove from the pan and set aside. Add {0011} and {0012} and cook until the onions are lightly browned. Stir in {0013} to coat the vegetables and cook for a further couple of minutes. Put the cabbage back into the pan.

steps.title: Combine broth and vegetables
steps.content: Strain the broth and pour it over the vegetables. Taste for seasoning and add more soy, mirin or sugar to taste. Add the white parts of {0014} and simmer until the cabbage is tender.

steps.title: Cook the noodles
steps.content: Cook {0015} according to the packet instructions, then run them under cold water and drain thoroughly. Toss them in {0016}.

steps.title: Assemble and serve
steps.content: Divide the noodles and {0017} between 4 large bowls, then ladle over the broth and vegetables. Sprinkle {0019} over {0018} if using, and add to the bowls. Garnish with the green parts of the spring onions, {0020} and {0021} if using. Serve with {0022} and {0023}.

notes:
**Vegan tip.** For a vegan ramen, cut a block of extra-firm tofu into chunks, pat dry and toss in a tablespoon of cornflour. Heat a tablespoon of vegetable oil in a frying pan and fry the tofu until crisp and browned on all sides. Drizzle with a few drops of sesame oil and sprinkle with sesame seeds. Add to the soup instead of the eggs.

**Make-ahead.** Tamago eggs need to be made in advance — the recipe does not include the preparation.
